title: centaurea elegans
intro: Centaurea elegans, also known as the elegant knapweed or mountain balm, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antacid. Centaurea elegans is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive problems and skin irritations.
